terminology.sectionLead: These terms use fixed translations so Chinese and English stay aligned.
terminology.defGuide: A travel guide here is a reusable itinerary with budgets and tips—editor picks or traveler write-ups. It is not a generic “article” or marketing fluff.
terminology.defSubmit: Submit means sending us an original trip write-up for possible publication. Some content may stay on your device first, then enter review.
terminology.defReview: Review (moderation) is our check for policy, accuracy, and quality before content is shown to everyone—not “audit” (finance sense).

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The page hit an error. You can try restoring the view, reloading, or going home.

ui.emptyFeaturedDesc: Nothing matches your search or filters. Try a wider budget, different trip length, or clear the search.
ui.emptyDestinationsDesc: Try different keywords or browse all destinations.
ui.emptyLatestDesc: Adjust filters or open the full guide list.
ui.emptyDestinationGuidesTitle: No guides for this place yet

commerce.membershipSub: Support authentic guides and community content; benefits are described on-site.
commerce.membershipNote: If an external signup URL is configured, it opens in a new tab; otherwise use About or the message board.
commerce.disclosure: This site focuses on budget guides and community—not outbound booking commissions. Ads and membership terms are explained on each page.

budgetGuide.panelDesc: More routes and Q&A here—no push to external OTAs.

discover.title: Discover on-site
discover.desc: Guides, places, Q&A, and buddies—your trip ideas stay in one place.

community.title: Community
community.heroSubtitle: Ask questions, find travel buddies, share experiences. Connect with budget travelers everywhere.
community.belonging: Every interaction builds belonging—so no one travels alone.
community.oneFamily: Wherever you start from, we’re all family.
community.localHint: Q&A, buddy posts and board are stored on this device; sync with backend for global interaction.
community.qaDesc: Ask and answer: visas, routes, money-saving tips.
community.buddiesDesc: Post your trip and find like-minded companions.
community.boardDesc: Share stories, vent, or tip off others.

qa.subtitle: Help each other—your question might be someone else’s answer.
qa.titlePlaceholder: e.g. How much THB for Thailand visa on arrival?
qa.noQuestionsYet: No questions yet. Be the first.

buddies.subtitle: Post your trip and find travel buddies. The world is better together.
buddies.introPlaceholder: Rough itinerary, budget, what kind of buddy, contact (optional)…
buddies.introRequired: Please add a short intro or needs
buddies.postSubmitted: Posted. Good luck finding a buddy.
buddies.noPostsYet: No buddy posts yet. Be the first.

board.title: Message Board
board.subtitle: Share good experiences, vent about pitfalls, or tip off other travelers. Please follow the community guidelines.
board.guidelinesBody: No vulgar language, political attacks, or discrimination based on faith or religion. Violations will be removed. Let’s keep this space friendly.
board.guidelinesShort: Please avoid vulgar, political, or faith-based attacks.
board.empty: No posts yet. Be the first.
board.noProfanity: Please avoid offensive language and try again
board.localOnly: Posts and likes are stored on this device only. For global discussion, use GitHub Discussions.

travelerVoice.listLead: Use ratings and review counts to shortlist destinations (demo data).
travelerVoice.photosHint: Photos for {{name}} — guide covers and hero image on this site
travelerVoice.writeReview: Write a note · Share your trip
travelerVoice.reviewsDisclaimer: Summaries are for inspiration only. Verify visas, safety, and policies. Continue the conversation about {{name}} on the board.
travelerVoice.sortHint: “Most helpful” uses total helpful counts (including yours). “Newest” uses review month. Votes are stored in this browser session.
travelerVoice.sortLiveHint: Under “Most helpful”, tapping Helpful re-sorts the list immediately.

home.heroEyebrow: Across the world, to find you
home.heroTitle: See the world on a budget
home.heroSubtitle: No hype—just real budgets and routes. Plan with confidence.
home.sloganRationale: Budget travel isn’t “cheap travel”—it’s spending wisely so you can go further, stress less, and stay longer where it matters.
home.sloganAlt3En: Budget is Limited, Dreams are Not.
home.sloganAlt3Zh: Your budget has limits, your dreams do not.
home.sloganAlt4Zh: Travel as a true global citizen.
home.searchNoResults: No guides matched. Try other keywords or English names (e.g. Thailand, Japan, Vietnam).
home.joinCommunityDesc: Q&A, find buddies, join the conversation — one world, one family

seo.title: Roamwise · Light Travel · Travel farther by spending smarter.
seo.description: Roamwise Light Travel — smart budget guides, destinations, and honest tips so you can explore further with confidence.
seo.descHome: Featured routes, destinations, and fresh guides—filter by budget and days with real costs and traveler tips.
seo.descDestinations: Browse budget destinations by continent, tags, and search—daily budget hints, visa notes, and route counts.
seo.descArticles: Editor picks and traveler guides—filter by budget and length, save favorites, or submit your own trip.
seo.descArticleDetail: Full guide: itinerary, budget, transport and lodging tips—always verify the latest rules before you go.
seo.descDestinationDetail: Destination overview: costs, visa, customs, risks, and related guides for this place.
seo.descFavorites: Your saved budget guides—quick access to routes and costs you care about.
seo.descCommunity: Community hub: Q&A, find buddies, and boards—travelers helping travelers.
seo.descCommunityQA: Travel Q&A—visas, routes, and money-saving tips. Content is stored locally for now.
seo.descCommunityQADetail: Q&A thread with the question and answers summary for trip planning.
seo.descCommunityBuddies: Find travel buddies—post your plan and needs; data stored locally for now.
seo.descBoard: Message board—share stories and warnings; follow community guidelines; local storage.
seo.descMembership: Membership perks to support the site; details on the signup page.
seo.descAbout: About Roamwise, community guidelines, and our smart-budget travel brand.
seo.descPrivacy: Privacy policy: what we collect, how we use data, and your choices.
seo.descTerms: Terms of service: rules and responsibilities for using this site.
seo.descFallback: Roamwise Light Travel—guides, destinations, and community.

footer.missionShort: Budget inspiration and real guides—here. Spend less, see more.
footer.taglineSub: Travel farther by spending smarter. Every trip deserves intent.

about.title: About this site
about.introBody: Roamwise is for travelers worldwide who want to spend smarter—not less joy. We’re a small, focused site: real budgets, honest routes, and community tips. We don’t try to out-scale giant OTAs; we help you stretch every dollar into more miles and richer stories.
about.playbookFinalBlurb: Roamwise means roaming wisely: smarter spending unlocks farther trips and better memories—not cutting corners on what matters.
about.guidelinesBody: No vulgar language, political attacks, or discrimination based on faith or religion. Violations will be removed. You’re welcome to share experiences, tips, or complaints on the message board and help keep this space friendly.

destinations.subtitle: Filter by continent and tags to find your next trip
destinations.searchPlaceholder: Search name, region, continent, or tags
destinations.noResults: No destinations match. Clear the search or reset continent/tags.

articles.subtitle: Real stories from backpackers, filter by destination and budget
articles.noResults: No guides match yet. Try loosening filters or check back later.

aiChat.title: AI assistant
aiChat.welcome: Hi—I’m the Roamwise assistant. Ask about destinations, budgets, visas, or finding travel buddies.
aiChat.error: Couldn’t reply right now. Try again or post in the community.
aiChat.serviceBusy: The service is busy. Please try again later.
aiChat.quotaHint: Today’s free quota: {{used}} / {{total}} (resets at local midnight)
aiChat.limitBody: You’ve used today’s free chat quota. It resets at local midnight; see Membership for possible extra quota (when available).
aiChat.limitFeatureUnlimited: Higher quota or priority access if offered on Membership
aiChat.limitFeatureFast: Support ongoing guides and community features
aiChat.limitFeatureAdvanced: Benefits are described on the Membership page

comments.title: Comments & notes
comments.invite: Share your experience below or join the GitHub discussion. Your story helps other travelers.
comments.giscusGithubLogin: Sign in with GitHub to comment
comments.giscusHint: Public comments load via Giscus and sync with GitHub Discussions. Sign in to GitHub before posting. Dark mode follows your system appearance.
comments.myNoteHint: My note (saved on this device only):

userGuide.formHint: Your real route and costs help other travelers. Stored locally; together with editor picks they form authentic budget guides.
userGuide.title: Title
userGuide.titlePlaceholder: e.g. 3 days in Bangkok on a budget
userGuide.contentRequired: Please add some experience or tips
userGuide.author: Nickname
userGuide.submitSuccess: Submitted for review. Thanks for sharing!
userGuide.recentUserGuidesSub: Real experiences + editor guides = reliable budget reference
userGuide.noUserGuidesYet: No traveler tips yet. Be the first.

articleDetail.loading: Loading content… You can check the info above or pick another guide.

governance.outdatedHint: This guide was last updated more than a year ago. Prices, routes, or visa rules may have changed—please double-check recent sources.
governance.reviewPendingBanner: This traveler submission is under review. When approved it will be shown to everyone; if not, it stays on this device only. Always verify with the latest official rules before you go.
governance.reviewHintShort: New posts enter the review queue.
governance.submitSpecBody: Include trip length, rough budget, transport/lodging tips, and pitfalls. Images can use external links for now. No illegal, infringing, false, or abusive content. Full media hosting and review notifications will come with the backend.
governance.submitCompactHint: Share real experiences; no harmful content. See the full form on the guides page for details.
governance.notificationsEmailHint: Email and in-app messages when a review completes will be enabled after the moderation backend is connected. Notifications are stored on this device for now.

notifications.submissionReceivedBody: Your guide is in the review queue. It will appear in the list when approved; email alerts will be available after the backend is connected.

destinationDetail.qaTeaserDesc: Visas, money, money-saving—see what travelers ask, or post a question.
destinationDetail.noGuides: No guides yet. Share your trip!

legal.privacyLead: Welcome to Roamwise (“the Site”). We respect your privacy. This policy explains how we handle information related to browsing guides, community features, and the AI assistant (if enabled). By using the Site you agree to this policy; if you disagree, please stop using the Site.
legal.privacySection1Body: (1) Usage & device data such as pages viewed and browser type, to improve content and performance. (2) Information you submit in forms or boards (some may stay only in your browser—see each page). (3) Third-party sign-in & comments: if you use GitHub via Giscus, identity and content are governed by that platform. (4) AI assistant: your messages are sent to the configured backend to generate replies—do not enter passwords or full ID numbers.
legal.privacySection2Body: We may use local storage for language, favorites, drafts, etc. You can clear it in browser settings.
legal.privacySection3Body: We do not sell personal data. Data may be shared with hosts or analytics as needed to run the service, or when required by law. Comments on GitHub are public per GitHub rules.
legal.privacySection4Body: You may exercise rights available in your region (access, correction, deletion, etc.). Contact us via published channels or GitHub Issues. We may update this policy and will change the date above.
legal.termsLead: Please read these terms before using Roamwise. Continued use means you accept them.
legal.termsSection1Body: We provide budget travel content and community tools. Some features rely on third parties (e.g. GitHub). We strive for accuracy but information may be incomplete or outdated—verify visas, safety, and transport yourself before travel.
legal.termsSection2Body: You agree not to post unlawful, infringing, false, abusive, or harmful content, and to follow community guidelines and partner rules. We may remove or restrict content that violates these terms.
legal.termsSection3Body: Site design and compilation are protected. Rights in user submissions depend on notices you give and applicable law; you warrant you have rights to what you submit.
legal.termsSection4Body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages from using or inability to use the Site. We are not responsible for outages caused by force majeure or third-party services.
legal.termsSection5Body: We may revise these terms; updates will be posted here. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
